original_statement: which nation had the fastest record?
mutated_statement: which group did something the fastest?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + lexical vagueness + syntactic category change: "nation" → "group" (specific entity → more general) | "had the fastest record" → "did something the fastest" (nominal possession of a measurable "record" replaced by a vague verb phrase with "something", loss of specificity).

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从iteration中的simple_query的thought和judge_thought可以直接识别关键信息：agent比较表中各队时间，列出m8+ (five:19.35)及其它时间，断定m8+为最快并给出具体答案。日志中没有任何关于问题模糊性的表述、疑问或澄清请求，也未使用诸如“ambiguous”、“unclear”或“需要更多信息”等词汇。agent未反思“group/做某事”相较于原问题的模糊化，而是将变异问题视为明确的速度比较并直接执行。因此符合“无法意识到指令模糊”的定义。
